# Master Hachimi (哈基米道长)

> Master Hachimi (哈基米道长 / Master Hachimi) is a cat-themed Mei Hua Yi Shu (Plum Blossom divination) companion app. You share two numbers and the question on your mind; a unified backend casts an I Ching hexagram by a fixed method, and a third-party AI service (its nature and our commitments are set out in the Privacy Policy) writes the reading in the warm voice of "Master Hachimi". It offers comfort and one small next step, for entertainment and emotional companionship only, never prediction, fate-changing, or luck. No account, reading history stays on your device, no ads. Brand Hachimi.ai. Available on the App Store (iOS) and Google Play (Android), distributed outside mainland China.

Official website: hachimi.ai. Last updated: 2026-07-09.

## Download

- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6787621766): Download for iPhone
- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.hachimi.hachimi_app): Download for Android

## About

Master Hachimi reframes "fortune telling" into "a cat-master takes your question seriously and answers with warmth." It is an emotional-value product: the functional value (a deterministic, trustworthy cast) is the floor; the emotional value (reassurance and company) is the main draw. The cat persona lowers the barrier and removes the "superstition" stigma. The red line is firm: it delivers a moment of company and one small next step, and never delivers prediction, fate-changing, luck-altering, or any other efficacy. Everything is "for entertainment only."

## How it works

### Ask: tell the cat what's on your mind

Type the question you're sitting with, then give two numbers off the top of your head. About thirty seconds, no sign-up, no account.

### Cast: a hexagram, the same way every time

Your two numbers and the current hour set a Mei Hua Yi Shu hexagram (upper trigram, lower trigram, and the moving line) by a fixed, deterministic method. Same inputs, same cast: honest math, no randomness, no smoke and mirrors. The cast runs on a unified backend, not on the device.

### Read: Master Hachimi reads it back

The cat-master responds in his own warm voice: a presentation of the hexagram, the body/use (体用) relationship, an overall tone, a gentle reading, a small piece of advice, and a blessing. Each reading is saved to your local reading history (卦历) so you can revisit it.

## Design Principles

### Deterministic casting

The cast (numbers → hexagram) is honest, reproducible computation. Only the reading text is AI-generated; the hexagram itself is never left to a language model.

### For entertainment only

No prediction, no fate-changing, no luck claims, no health/financial/legal efficacy. The persona and red lines are hardened at the system level. For any real decision, consult a qualified professional.

### No account, privacy-first

There is no account and no login, and no third-party analytics SDKs. Reading history is stored only on your device. On the backend, cast events (your question, scenario, hexagram, and reading) are stored only while "Help improve readings" is on, keyed to a resettable anonymous install ID, with free text auto-deleted after 90 days; with it off, the backend stores nothing. Only your question + chosen scenario + hexagram + time-of-day are forwarded to the third-party AI service to write the reading; the two cast numbers are never sent to that third-party service.

### A warm cat companion

A cat-master ("哈基米道长") who actually listens, turning "asking a question" into "having a cat sit with you for a moment."

## Product Facts

- 64 hexagrams
- 6 reading facets (hexagram presentation, body/use, overall tone, reading, advice, blessing)
- 0 accounts needed
- 3 interface languages (Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English)

## FAQ

### Is this real fortune telling?

No. Master Hachimi is for entertainment and emotional comfort only. The readings are not predictions and make no claim of accuracy, luck-changing, fate-changing, or any other efficacy. For any real decision, talk to a qualified professional.

### How is a reading made?

You give two numbers and a question. The backend casts a Mei Hua Yi Shu hexagram from the numbers and the current hour using a fixed, deterministic method, then sends the hexagram, the hour, your question, and your chosen scenario to a third-party AI service, which writes the reading in Master Hachimi's voice. The two cast numbers are never sent to that third-party service.

### What about my privacy?

There is no account and no login. Your reading history is stored only on your device. On the backend, cast events are stored only while "Help improve readings" is on (keyed to a resettable anonymous install ID, free text auto-deleted after 90 days); with it off, the backend stores nothing, and there are no third-party analytics SDKs. To write a reading, your question is sent to a third-party AI service; the provider's identity and commitments (such as not training on paid-tier content, and retaining it only briefly for abuse prevention) are set out in the Privacy Policy. You consent before your first reading and can withdraw any time.

### Which platforms is it on?

It's on both. Get it on the [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6787621766) for iPhone, or on [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.hachimi.hachimi_app) for Android.

### Does it cost anything?

The app is free to use, and there are no ads.

### How do I delete my data?

Your history lives on your device: delete it in the app's Settings, or simply uninstall. If you ever turned on "Help improve readings", the anonymous records you sent are kept for at most 90 days, then deleted; resetting your anonymous ID in Settings unlinks them right away.

## How we keep it honest (Methodology)

The website has a dedicated transparency page ([/en/methodology](https://hachimi.ai/en/methodology), [/zh/methodology](https://hachimi.ai/zh/methodology)) that lays the method open:

- The cast: two numbers plus the current hour set a Mei Hua Yi Shu hexagram by a fixed method. Same numbers and same hour always give the same hexagram, byte for byte across iOS and Android. Each cast carries a SHA-256 fingerprint, so it is reproducible and tamper-evident.
- The reading: only after the cast does the AI write the reading, in Master Hachimi's voice (which model exactly is set out in the Privacy Policy). The AI can shape the words but cannot touch the hexagram or decide the fortune. The fortune's tone is fixed by the Host and Guest trigrams' five-element relationship, the find-item direction is derived by the cast engine, and the persona and red lines (no prediction / fate-changing / luck) are held in the system prompt.
- The eval gate: 30 golden cases across four scenarios and two languages, plus 4 adversarial cases that probe the red lines, run on every code change. A hard gate first checks the fortune's tone was not tampered with; then a stronger model sits as judge on four criteria (on topic, no "prediction" red line, voice holds, offers a real first step). Model selection is data-driven against this golden set, not by feel.

## Technical Notes

- Native iOS client (thin client): no third-party LLM key on device; casts and readings come from the unified backend.
- Unified backend: Hono on Cloudflare Workers (api.hachimi.ai), stateless thin proxy, deterministic Mei Hua Yi Shu cast engine.
- Reading model: a third-party AI service via the Vercel AI SDK; the model choice evolves with the eval matrix and the Privacy Policy disclosure is authoritative.
- Anti-abuse: per-IP rate limiting and request body limits; client device-integrity attestation (Firebase App Check, wrapping Apple App Attest on iOS and Play Integrity on Android) is planned (not yet enforced at launch).
- Local persistence: reading history stored on device only.
